summary: **Status: maintainer VOID decision, 2026-07-12.** The RULES-1 GPU campaign `poc/rules-1/results-incoming/20260712-070956-modal/` (13,470 rows, arms A1/A3/A5/A7/c1 × seeds 0,1,2, wall 4.59 h, ~$5) is **VOIDED as an instrument failure and is NOT graded**. No row from it may ever be appended to the rules-1 results log or consumed by any verdict. The successor experiment is **rules-1-b** (`registry/experiments/rules-1-b.json`, supersedes rules-1) with a fixed harness and a new host-validity instrume
title: RULES-1 run 1 VOID — degenerate host instrument (post-mortem)
